alignments.preprint_claim_text: It is possible to accurately reproduce chemistry using just a small subset of physical conditions in protoplanetary disk models.
alignments.pub_claim_text: It is possible to accurately reproduce chemistry using just a small subset of physical conditions in protoplanetary disk models.
alignments.rationale: The publication claim is effectively identical in wording and meaning to the preprint claim, so the result is unchanged.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed method can be used for Bayesian fitting of the line emission data to retrieve disk properties from observations.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed method can be used for Bayesian fitting of the line emission data to retrieve disk properties from observations.
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats the same conclusion with equivalent scope and confidence.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: A K-nearest neighbors (KNN) regressor was trained to instantly predict the chemistry of other disk models.
alignments.pub_claim_text: A pipeline for reproducing the same approach on other disk chemical model sets is presented.
alignments.rationale: The publication shifts emphasis from a specific KNN regressor to presenting a reproducible pipeline for applying the approach to other model sets, broadening applicability and expressing higher certainty.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The study discusses the uncertainties and limitations of the proposed method.
alignments.pub_claim_text: There are uncertainties and limitations associated with the method used for predicting the chemistry of disk models.
alignments.rationale: Both statements convey the same acknowledgement of uncertainties and limitations with similar scope and confidence.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: A novel federated learning architecture, FedStack, was proposed to support ensembling heterogeneous architectural client models.
alignments.pub_claim_text: A novel federated learning architecture, FedStack, was proposed to support ensembling heterogeneous architectural client models.
alignments.rationale: The publication claim matches the preprint claim verbatim, indicating no change.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The local CNN model outperformed ANN and Bi-LSTM models on each subject data.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The local CNN model outperformed ANN and Bi-LSTM models on each subject data.
alignments.rationale: The result statement is the same in preprint and publication.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed work has demonstrated better performance for heterogeneous stacking of the local models compared to homogeneous stacking.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed work has demonstrated better performance for heterogeneous stacking of the local models compared to homogeneous stacking.
alignments.rationale: Both versions assert the same comparative performance result.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: This work sets the stage to build an enhanced RPM system that incorporates client privacy to assist with clinical observations for patients in an acute mental health facility.
alignments.pub_claim_text: This work sets the stage to build an enhanced RPM system that incorporates client privacy to assist with clinical observations for patients in an acute mental health facility.
alignments.rationale: The publication retains this concluding claim verbatim; no substantive change in meaning or confidence.

alignments.pub_claim_text: Optimum placement of the sensors on human limbs resulted in better activity recognition.
alignments.rationale: This conclusion appears in the publication but was not present in the preprint, so it is an added claim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed strategy can control the mean exit time of general stochastic dynamical systems to achieve a desired value.
alignments.pub_claim_text: We propose a strategy to control mean exit time of general stochastic dynamical systems to achieve a desired value based on the quasipotential concept and machine learning.
alignments.rationale: The publication restates the same high-level strategy claim with equivalent scope and confidence.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: A neural network architecture was developed to compute the global quasipotential function.
alignments.pub_claim_text: We develop a neural network architecture to compute the global quasipotential function.
alignments.rationale: The contribution of a neural network architecture is present in both versions with the same meaning.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The systematic iterated numerical algorithm can calculate the controller for a given mean exit time.
alignments.rationale: The publication does not explicitly claim the specific iterated numerical algorithm for calculating the controller; the detailed algorithmic claim appears omitted or de-emphasized.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The control strategy is effective and sufficiently accurate based on numerical experiments.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Numerical experiments with various dimensions and structures demonstrate that our control strategy is effective and sufficiently accurate.
alignments.rationale: Both statements assert the effectiveness and accuracy of the control strategy based on numerical experiments with equivalent scope.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The most probable path between metastable attractors can be identified using the effective Hamilton-Jacobi scheme and the trained neural network.
alignments.pub_claim_text: We identify the most probable path between metastable attractors with the help of the effective Hamilton–Jacobi scheme and the trained neural network.
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats this result in equivalent terms, indicating no substantive change.

alignments.pub_claim_text: RepsNet adapts pre-trained vision and language models to interpret medical images and generate automated reports in natural language.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The counterpart discovery method in DivEA explicitly models the chance of a potential mapping. (certainty=high, type=contribution)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The broadband diffractive processor can approximate Nw unique complex-valued linear transforms with negligible error when the number of diffractive neurons (N) is ≥2NwNiNo. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed system reduces the processing time by 20 to 30 milliseconds on average.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The study enhances accuracy and processing time using the autoencoder method to solve the overfitting problem.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The mobile charger is endowed with a charging policy that adapts to the current state of the network.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The charging policy developed for the mobile charger is conditioned on the current state of the network, allowing for adaptability to spontaneous changes in network topology.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The empirical results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms existing on-demand algorithms by a significant margin.

alignments.rationale: The empirical-performance claim is carried over verbatim in the publication with equivalent strength.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The IB-IRM approach has demonstrated its power to solve challenges in using invariant risk minimization for linear classification problems.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The IB-IRM approach has demonstrated its power to solve challenges in using invariant risk minimization for linear classification problems.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Two failure modes that IB-IRM (and IRM) could fail for learning the invariant features have been illustrated.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Empirical experiments on several datasets verify the theoretical results of the CSIB learning algorithm.

alignments.pub_claim_text: The key assumption of support overlap of invariant features used in IB-IRM guarantees out-of-distribution generalization.
alignments.rationale: The publication explicitly states the support-overlap assumption as guaranteeing OOD generalization, which is a stronger/explicit framing not present as a standalone claim in the preprint.
